{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iteration 943
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Iteration 943]] was potentially a test run.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
